---
title: "First Assignment"
author:
  - name: "Naïm Saadi Gallego"
    email: "nsg9@alumnes.udl.cat"
date: "Month day, 2025"
lof: true
toc: true
indent: true
fig-pos: H
callout-appearance: simple
number-sections: true
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        % --- Centered title page with logo ---
        \usepackage{titling}
        \makeatletter
        \renewcommand{\maketitle}{
          \begin{titlepage}
            \vspace*{\fill} % centers vertically
            \begin{center}
              \includegraphics[width=5cm]{figures/logo.png}\\[1.5cm]
              \vskip -3em
              {\LARGE\bfseries \@title \par}
              \vskip 1em
              {\large
                \lineskip .5em
                \begin{tabular}[t]{c}
                  \@author
                \end{tabular}\par}
              \vskip 1em
              {\large \@date}
            \end{center}
            \vspace*{\fill} % centers vertically
          \end{titlepage}
        }
        \makeatother

        % --- Reduce space above/below section headings ---
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{0.5em plus .2em minus .2em}{0.3em}
        \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{0.3em plus .1em minus .1em}{0.2em}

        % --- Slightly tighter paragraph spacing ---
        \setlength{\parskip}{0.4em}
        \setlength{\parindent}{5pt}
        \usepackage{appendix}
---
